summary: Iteration 26 Home Operations & Compliance module — full backend + frontend testing complete. Backend pytest: 15/15 PASS for test_iteration26.py. Regression: 105/106 passed (1 unrelated network timeout in test_iteration23 file-delete test). Frontend Playwright: all critical flows confirmed across manager / senior / staff / mobile viewports. RBAC, modal flows, sign-off, delete, PDF gating and check-tile/maintenance grids all verified working end-to-end against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeOperations.jsx is 1056 lines — getting close to the 700-line guideline threshold. Recommend splitting QuickLogModal, MaintenanceModal, MaintenanceView, HistoryView, ChecksView, DashboardView each into their own file under /pages/operations/ for maintainability.

server.py is 6639 lines — long-standing concern; iteration 26 added ~370 lines under '# Home Operations & Compliance'. Consider extracting compliance/maintenance routers into separate FastAPI routers.
Sign-off button in HistoryView re-uses confirm() via window.confirm for delete — UX-OK for now, but consider moving to a shared Dialog primitive for consistency with rest of app.

PDF download is initiated via direct fetch + blob link (not navigation), which is correct, but the playwright `expect_download` test could not detect it — main agent may want to add data-testid='pdf-download-anchor' on the temporary <a> for future automation.
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123, admin@care.local / Admin@123 — all confirmed working
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_Broken light maintenance entry as manager during testing (not cleaned up — auto-prefixed with TEST_ for easy future cleanup). 16 compliance log entries already seeded by previous runs were used for sign-off/delete verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 (Home Operations) is fully working. Selectors confirmed: ops-tab-{dashboard|checks|maintenance|history}, stat-{overdue|due-soon|ok|never}, quick-log-modal, maintenance-modal, maint-add (NOT 'maintenance-report-issue'), history-signoff-{id}, history-delete-{id}, maint-delete-{id}, log-{check_type_id}, ops-snapshot-pdf, nav-operations. RBAC: PDF + history signoff/delete + maintenance delete only visible for tier>=3 (manager/admin). Senior CAN add/edit maintenance but cannot delete. Staff CAN add/edit maintenance but cannot delete. nav-operations is visible to all roles. The pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration26.py covers 15 backend tests and is the regression source-of-truth.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 26. The single regression failure in test_iteration23.py::test_delete_file_staff_forbidden was a network-level ConnectTimeoutError to the preview URL, unrelated to iter26 changes; running it in isolation typically passes.

manager: all 4 stat tiles populated (Overdue 0 / Due soon 1 / Up to date 2 / Never logged 12)
Compliance tab shows Needs attention panel + 5 grouped sections (Temperature, Water, Fire, Health & safety, Audits)
Safety checks tab — 15 log buttons with data-testid log-{check_id}
Maintenance tab — maint-add opens maintenance-modal, save creates record (rows 1→2)
History tab — 16 rows, 16 sign-off buttons, 16 delete buttons
Sign off click succeeds — 'Signed off' toast + ✓ Sarah Manager next to row
mobile_390x844: quick-log-modal opens as bottom sheet on mobile viewport
backend_curl_verified: GET /api/compliance/snapshot.pdf returns 200 application/pdf with %PDF- magic bytes for manager
